---
title: "Resources"
format: html
---

This page is a work in progress! Check back later for more updates.

This page is just a list of my favorite resources, organized by theme/utility.

### Coding Resources

### Data Management/Organization

### Fellowship/Job Search and Prep

### Website Building

This website was entirely built through R and Quarto, thanks so the helpful resources provided by [Sam Shanny-Csik](https://samanthacsik.github.io/).
